race.comment: PISTON REBEL (2) resumed with a 1.3L defeat over 1640m at Doomben and then couldn't have been more impressive in a CL3 at Eagle Farm, beaten just 1L after settling last from a wide gate. Pulled up with mild heat stress there last time. Goes well here and back in grade today will be hard to roll. HEROIC REBEL (1) missed a whisker here over 1660m and then found one better over 1600m at Eagle Farm in a CL1 beaten 2.5L, jumping favourite again. He will keep improving for the premier metro stable, and Moor replaces the apprentice. Maps for the run of the race and is a winning chance. OUR JEWEL (9) peaks and is on the improve. Placed over 1666m here two back and then missed the placings, beaten 2.7L at the track, dropping back to a sprint. Carries 3kg less, and the step-up to 1700m should suit. Ben Thompson sticking aboard is a decent push for her chances. BUSKER (5) has been knocking on the door over 1600m. The gate is awkward but he can't be ruled out.
